item.title: Images of Note: DAFAD
item.description:
Elon Musk is going full Glinner.
I was going to say "5. God", but I realized that's just the same as the "Free market".
YES
Powerful
Yeah basically
I see LFS users like powerful wizards. I respect them, and yes, I do also fear them. Anyone who builds Linux from Scratch is a powerful wizard.
He sounds like a lovely man :)
and the command? sudo poweroff.
PISS
You heard it here first folk, they wanna keep University expensive because they wanna make you join the military.
Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Quora.
It has a fucking VHS deck!
Yeah.
"Upgraded"
repeat after me
yay toby!
wizard
owo
Vivian and Elon battling ontop of the burning x headquarters with swords.
:3
Then what's the fucking point in Incognito mode? https://edition.cnn.com/2024/04/01/tech/google-to-delete-data-records-to-settle-incognito-lawsuit/index.html
oh god
Behold, a Linux from Scratch user
We are all here for one reason only, to dunk on Arch users.
Week!
This is what it's like when America invades your country.
This is what living in Edinburgh during the Festival is like. One moment you're going to HMV and the next you're stuck in the city center because one of the Fringe Shows was the world's largest Silent Disco or something (also fuck Silent Disco walks).
Literally the first song I ever remember singing.
We fucking deep fry pizzas here but I'm with the Italians here.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I repost bottom shelf memes for sport.
item.description:
Ayo. It's @JKBenton
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) has a livestream. Follow twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka to feed her a treat.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday RANDOM MEMES dump that made me exhale
item.description:
1. He was like YO WHOT M8
2. The snake ate here homework so she brought the snake to testify
3. Soon...
4. Tan Perkins P.S. To be fair everyone is ethnic
5
6. POV: Someone I actually like achieves something great for themselves :)
7
8. Princess Bride Dumb & Dumber Crossover
9. Is this like a new boss you have to fight IRL?
10. Lim'-o Wayne found out
11. Surprise M'efer
12. I really can't think of a witty caption for this particular situation...
13. STRAIGHT FROM THE SOURCE
14. OMG this is hilarious (Btw, accent aside, have you noticed that people's voice sound different when they try to speak different languages or is it like me being confused?)
15 As a small game dev this is how may days go, pretty much. Anyway If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P. S. If you have mental health issues, hope this dump helped a bit to cheer you up! Stay strong : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I'm in a remote rural town with almost 0 light pollution. Trying my hand at astrophotography.
item.description:
Just very basic stuff. I'm taking this with just a tripod stabilized phone camera.
Came out nice though. Maybe I'll invest in some better gear and see what I can produce.

item.title: Unnecessary Repairs to Help Danish Jews
item.description: Sauce: David K. Fremon, The Holocaust Heroes (Springfield, NJ: Enslow Publications, Inc., 1998), p. 75. Rescue of the Danish Jews It was the evening of 1 October 1943, when German Police and members of the Danish SS descended on Copenhagen with orders to round up and deport Denmark’s Jewish population. It was the night of the Jewish New Year, Rosh HaShanah, and the German Police were expecting to find Jewish families at home celebrating. What they found instead was empty house after empty house.  Someone had tipped off the Jewish community... By the end of the war, over 95% of Denmark's nearly eight thousand Jews would escape Denmark, and avoid becoming victims of the Holocaust. This survival rate is extraordinary, unfortunately, this was not the case across the rest of Nazi-occupied Europe. In this video, we examine the specific set of circumstances surrounding Denmark during the Second World War and learn how they enabled nearly all of Denmark’s Jews to survive the Holocaust. https://www.iwm.org.uk/history/rescue-of-the-danish-jews Why almost all of Denmark's Jews survived the Holocaust https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9yU3ALfVcp0&t=6s
item.dc:creator: oukid

item.title: Gabital 11: Supply and demand
item.description: The law of supply and demand states that a decrease in the prices of goods increases demand, but the opposite is also true: an increase in demand provokes prices to rise if left uncontrolled.
item.dc:creator: GabitalEN

item.title: Dnd memes and other relatable memes
item.description: Hello lovely people. we are looking for friends for a dnd server. We have plenty of DMs working together on multiple stories and a lot of games from one shots, giant encounters to longer campaigns. We have a tavern for RP, memes and art. https://discord.gg/UskFHjb5

item.title: The Moon Dressed Like Saturn
item.description: Saturn? No. What is pictured are foreground clouds on Earth crossing in front of the Moon! The Moon shows a slight crescent phase with most of its surface visible by reflected Earthlight, known as Da Vinci glow. The Sun directly illuminates the brightly lit lunar crescent from the bottom, which means that the Sun must be below the horizon and so the image was taken before sunrise. This double take-inducing picture was captured on 2019 December 24, two days before the Moon slid in front of the Sun to create a solar eclipse. In the foreground, lights from small Guatemalan towns are visible behind the huge volcano Pacaya. Image: Francisco Sojuel
item.dc:creator: 16bitStarbuck

item.title: I've hated these handrails since I bought the house. I finally got rid of them! The carpeted stairs are next to go.
